name: Manjistha Radiant Glow Bar
ingredients: Pure Manjistha Powder, Coconut Oil, Vitamin E Oil, Rose Water
description: Our signature Ayurvedic powerhouse. Handcrafted with authentic Manjistha (Indian Madder), this bar naturally purifies, brightens your complexion, and gently fades blemishes for a flawless, natural glow.

name: Disha Signature Assortment Box
ingredients: A customized selection of our purest herbal blends.
description: Experience the full spectrum of nature's care. Choose a beautifully packaged assortment of our handcrafted soaps, featuring our intricate floral and classic designs.

name: Chandan (Sandalwood) Soap
ingredients: Chandan powder, Rose water, Vitamin E oil, Badam oil, Coconut oil, Fragrance
description: Moisturises and soothes skin while acting as an anti-aging natural cleanser. Promotes a natural glow.

name: Aloevera Soap
ingredients: Aloevera powder, Vitamin E oil, Rose water, Kasturi Haldi, Fragrance
description: Deeply moisturises and hydrates the skin. Provides anti-aging benefits and relief for dry skin.

name: Beet Root Soap
ingredients: Beetroot powder, Rose water, Aloevera gel, Vitamin E oil, Fragrance
description: Helps maintain a youthful feel and hydrates the skin while controlling acne and brightening the complexion.

name: Masoor Dal Soap
ingredients: Masoor Dal powder, Aloevera powder, Vitamin E oil, Badam oil, Fragrance
description: Exfoliates and brightens the skin. Provides skin tightening, moisturisation, and anti-aging benefits.

name: Manjishta Soap
ingredients: Manjishta, Aloevera Gel, Vitamin E oil, Rose water, Fragrance
description: Prevents acne, brightens skin, reduces tan, and helps maintain an even skin tone.

name: Haldi (Turmeric) Soap
ingredients: Kasturi Haldi powder, Aloevera Gel, Vitamin E oil, Rose water, Fragrance
description: Anti-bacterial formula that reduces acne and scars while promoting a bright, natural glow. Suitable for sensitive skin.

name: Milk and Honey Soap
ingredients: Milk powder, Rose water, Badam oil, Honey, Fragrance
description: An anti-aging and anti-acne cleanser that has a brightening effect and promotes a natural glow.

name: Lemon Soap
ingredients: Lemon peel powder, Rose water, Vitamin E oil, Coconut oil, Lemon grass fragrance
description: Skin tightening bar that evens skin tone, reduces acne scars, and provides anti-aging benefits. Recommended for acne-prone skin.

name: Activated Charcoal Soap
ingredients: Charcoal powder, Aloevera gel powder, Vitamin E oil, Coconut oil, Fragrance
description: Controls oil and acne while brightening the skin. Provides gentle cleansing and minimizes pores.

name: Neem Soap
ingredients: Neem powder, Kasturi Haldi powder, Vitamin E oil, Rose water, Coconut oil
description: Highly anti-inflammatory and anti-bacterial. Protects and heals the skin natively.

name: Cool Mint Refresher Soap

description: A breath of fresh air for your skin. This invigorating marbled bar delivers an instant cooling sensation, perfect for beating the heat and soothing tired skin.
